evidence_summary: Docs-only round publishes the one planned milestone-4 final handoff artifact only, carries forward explicit boundary-revision candidate exactly from the accepted round-200 to round-151 lineage, binds exactly one planning-only explicit boundary-revision family for broader positive P5 polymorphism-nested-forall support beyond the one settled retained-child clear-boundary lane, keeps P2 unopened and preserved negative-family rows closed, and does not authorize a separate enablement step, concrete revision work, or any second handoff.
